name: Mexican Corn Bread (Nmsu Extension)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the muffin mix according to package directions. Substitute 1 cup of corn for 1 cup of milk.
2. Add onion and peppers to the mix.
3. Pour the mixture into a pan.
4. Top with cream, then sprinkle with cheese.
5. Bake at 425°F for 40 minutes. Leftovers can be used as a stuffing for poultry. Any sharp American cheese may be substituted.
